tEn: Scaling Embeddings Outperforms Scaling Experts in Language Models
tZh: 缩放嵌入在语言模型中优于缩放专家
sEn: Scaling embeddings outperforms scaling experts in language models, achieving better Pareto efficiency and inference speedups.
sZh: 在语言模型中，缩放嵌入比缩放专家表现更优，能实现更好的帕累托效率和推理加速。
absEn: While Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures have become the standard for sparsity scaling in large language models, they increasingly face diminishing returns and system-level bottlenecks. In this work, we explore embedding scaling as a potent, orthogonal dimension for scaling sparsity. Through a comprehensive analysis and experiments, we identify specific regimes where embedding scaling achieves a superior Pareto frontier compared to expert scaling. We systematically characterize the critical architectural factors governing this efficacy -- ranging from parameter budgeting to the interplay with model width and depth. Moreover, by integrating tailored system optimizations and speculative decoding, we effectively convert this sparsity into tangible inference speedups. Guided by these insights, we introduce LongCat-Flash-Lite, a 68.5B parameter model with ~3B activated trained from scratch. Despite allocating over 30B parameters to embeddings, LongCat-Flash-Lite not only surpasses parameter-equivalent MoE baselines but also exhibits exceptional competitiveness against existing models of comparable scale, particularly in agentic and coding domains.
absZh: 尽管混合专家（MoE）架构已成为大型语言模型中稀疏性缩放的标准，但它们日益面临收益递减和系统级瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们探索了嵌入缩放作为稀疏性缩放的一个强大且正交的维度。通过全面的分析和实验，我们确定了嵌入缩放相比专家缩放能够实现更优帕累托前沿的特定场景。我们系统地描述了影响这种效能的关键架构因素——从参数预算到与模型宽度和深度的相互作用。此外，通过整合定制的系统优化和推测解码，我们有效地将这种稀疏性转化为实际的推理加速。在这些见解的指导下，我们提出了LongCat-Flash-Lite，一个685亿参数、约30亿激活的模型，从头开始训练。尽管将超过300亿参数分配给嵌入，LongCat-Flash-Lite不仅超越了参数等效的MoE基线，而且在代理和编码领域与现有同等规模模型相比表现出卓越的竞争力。

items.en: While Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures have become the standard for sparsity scaling in large language models, they increasingly face diminishing returns and system-level bottlenecks. In this work, we explore embedding scaling as a potent, orthogonal dimension for scaling sparsity. Through a comprehensive analysis and experiments, we identify specific regimes where embedding scaling achieves a superior Pareto frontier compared to expert scaling. We systematically characterize the critical architectural factors governing this efficacy—ranging from parameter budgeting to the interplay with model width and depth. Moreover, by integrating tailored system optimizations and speculative decoding, we effectively convert this sparsity into tangible inference speedups. Guided by these insights, we introduce LongCat-Flash-Lite, a 68.5B parameter model with ∼\sim3B activated trained from scratch. Despite allocating over 30B parameters to embeddings, LongCat-Flash-Lite not only surpasses parameter-equivalent MoE baselines but also exhibits exceptional competitiveness against existing models of comparable scale, particularly in agentic and coding domains.
items.zh: 尽管混合专家（MoE）架构已成为大语言模型中稀疏性缩放的标准，但它们日益面临收益递减和系统级瓶颈。在这项工作中，我们探索了嵌入缩放作为稀疏性缩放的一个强大且正交的维度。通过全面的分析和实验，我们确定了嵌入缩放相比专家缩放实现更优帕累托前沿的特定区间。我们系统地描述了决定这种有效性的关键架构因素——从参数预算到与模型宽度和深度的相互作用。此外，通过整合定制的系统优化和推测解码，我们有效地将这种稀疏性转化为可观的推理加速。在这些见解的指导下，我们推出了LongCat-Flash-Lite，一个从零训练的685亿参数模型，激活参数约30亿。尽管将超过300亿参数分配给嵌入，LongCat-Flash-Lite不仅超越了参数等效的MoE基线，而且在智能体和编码领域与现有同等规模模型相比表现出卓越的竞争力。

items.en: The Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture has firmly established itself as the dominant paradigm for scaling Large Language Models (LLMs), enabling massive parameter counts while maintaining manageable computational costs Lepikhin et al. (2021). By dynamically routing tokens to a subset of experts, models decouple parameter capacity from computational cost, allowing LLMs to scale to trillons of parameters while keeping modest inference latency. However, as the model size and sparsity level increase, the marginal gain in performance diminishes, eventually approaching an efficiency saturation point (Abnar et al., 2025). Furthermore, the practical expansion of experts is constrained by system-level bottlenecks, particularly the escalating communication overhead and memory bandwidth pressure in distributed training. This necessitates the exploration of alternative, orthogonal dimensions for scaling sparse parameters beyond the Feed-Forward Networks (FFNs).
items.zh: 混合专家（MoE）架构已牢固确立为缩放大语言模型（LLM）的主导范式，使得在保持可控计算成本的同时实现海量参数计数成为可能（Lepikhin等人，2021）。通过将token动态路由到专家子集，模型将参数容量与计算成本解耦，使LLM能够扩展到数万亿参数，同时保持适度的推理延迟。然而，随着模型规模和稀疏性水平的增加，性能的边际增益逐渐减小，最终接近效率饱和点（Abnar等人，2025）。此外，专家的实际扩展受到系统级瓶颈的制约，特别是分布式训练中不断增加的通信开销和内存带宽压力。这促使我们探索在前馈网络（FFN）之外缩放稀疏参数的其他正交维度。

items.en: In contrast to MoE, the embedding layer offers an overlooked, inherently sparse dimension with O​(1)O(1) lookup complexity. This allows for massive parameter expansion without routing overheads—effectively achieving parameter extension without computation explosion. Theoretical foundations for this dimension have been established by scaling laws with vocabulary (Tao et al., 2024), which posit that larger models necessitate proportionally larger vocabularies to maximize computation efficiency. To exploit this potential, diverse strategies have been proposed. One prominent direction is structural expansion, exemplified by Per-Layer Embedding (PLE) (Google DeepMind, 2025; Sadhukhan et al., 2026; bcml-labs, 2025), which allocates independent embedding parameters to each layer to scale capacity. Another key direction is vocabulary expansion via n-grams to densify information per token. This concept traces back to lookup-table language models (Huang et al., 2021) in the RNN era and has recently been advanced in LLMs (Clark et al., 2022; Huang et al., 2025; Pagnoni et al., 2025; Cheng et al., 2026). These approaches collectively highlight the embedding layer as a fertile ground for scaling.
items.zh: 与MoE相比，嵌入层提供了一个被忽视的、固有稀疏的维度，具有O(1)查找复杂度。这允许在无路由开销的情况下进行大规模参数扩展——有效实现参数扩展而不导致计算爆炸。这一维度的理论基础已由词汇缩放定律建立（Tao等人，2024），该定律认为更大的模型需要成比例更大的词汇量以最大化计算效率。为利用这一潜力，已提出多种策略。一个主要方向是结构扩展，例如逐层嵌入（PLE）（Google DeepMind，2025；Sadhukhan等人，2026；bcml-labs，2025），它为每一层分配独立的嵌入参数以扩展容量。另一个关键方向是通过n-gram进行词汇扩展，以密集化每个token的信息。这一概念可追溯到RNN时代的查找表语言模型（Huang等人，2021），最近在LLM中得到了推进（Clark等人，2022；Huang等人，2025；Pagnoni等人，2025；Cheng等人，2026）。这些方法共同凸显了嵌入层作为缩放沃土的潜力。

items.en: Despite the recent interest in expanding embedding parameters in LLMs, several key challenges remain underexplored. First, the comparative scaling efficiency between expert parameters and embedding parameters is not well understood, leaving the optimal allocation of capacity between these two sparse dimensions ambiguous. Second, the constraints of scaling embeddings are still not systematically characterized: it remains unclear how factors such as the total parameter budget, vocabulary size, initialization schemes, and the trade-offs between model width and depth jointly influence the effectiveness and stability of embedding scaling. Third, while some methods for scaling embeddings have been proposed, it is still unclear which scaling strategy is more effective and efficient under different regimes. Finally, scaling embeddings alters the input/output characteristics of the model during decoding, potentially impacting the overall I/O efficiency, yet its consequences for end-to-end inference performance remain insufficiently analyzed and optimized.
items.zh: 尽管近期对LLM中扩展嵌入参数的兴趣增加，但几个关键挑战仍未充分探索。首先，专家参数与嵌入参数之间的缩放效率比较尚未得到很好理解，导致这两个稀疏维度之间容量最优分配不明确。其次，缩放嵌入的约束条件仍未系统表征：尚不清楚总参数预算、词汇量、初始化方案以及模型宽度与深度之间的权衡等因素如何共同影响嵌入缩放的有效性和稳定性。第三，尽管已提出一些缩放嵌入的方法，但在不同区间下哪种缩放策略更有效和高效仍不清楚。最后，缩放嵌入改变了模型在解码过程中的输入/输出特性，可能影响整体I/O效率，但其对端到端推理性能的影响仍未得到充分分析和优化。

items.en: In this technical report, we present a study to address these challenges and establish a robust framework for embedding scaling. Our contributions are as follows:
items.zh: 在本技术报告中，我们提出了一项研究以应对这些挑战，并建立了一个稳健的嵌入缩放框架。我们的贡献如下：

items.en: Comparison of Embedding Scaling vs. Expert Scaling: Through comprehensive scaling experiments across diverse scenarios, we identify specific regimes where embedding scaling achieves a superior Pareto frontier compared to increasing expert numbers, offering a high-efficiency alternative for model scaling.
items.zh: 嵌入缩放与专家缩放的比较：通过在不同场景下的全面缩放实验，我们确定了嵌入缩放相比增加专家数量实现更优帕累托前沿的特定区间，为模型缩放提供了一种高效替代方案。

items.en: Impact Analysis of Architectural Factors: We establish the complete set of architectural factors determining embedding scaling efficacy, covering the integration timing, parameter budgeting, hash collisions, hyperparameter settings and initialization of embedding, together with the effects of model width and depth. Besides, we investigate different methods of scaling embedding and find that N-gram Embedding offers the most robust scalability.
items.zh: 架构因素影响分析：我们建立了决定嵌入缩放有效性的完整架构因素集，涵盖集成时机、参数预算、哈希冲突、超参数设置和嵌入初始化，以及模型宽度和深度的影响。此外，我们研究了不同的嵌入缩放方法，发现N-gram嵌入提供了最稳健的可扩展性。

items.en: Inference Efficiency and System Optimization: We demonstrate that N-gram Embedding largely reduce I/O bottlenecks in MoE layers, particularly when paired with speculative decoding to maximize hardware utilization. Addressing the concomitant embedding overhead, we propose a specialized N-gram Cache and synchronized kernels, ensuring that the reduction in active parameters translates directly to lower latency and higher throughput.
items.zh: 推理效率与系统优化：我们证明N-gram嵌入大大减少了MoE层中的I/O瓶颈，特别是当与推测解码配对以最大化硬件利用率时。针对伴随的嵌入开销，我们提出了专门的N-gram缓存和同步内核，确保活跃参数的减少直接转化为更低的延迟和更高的吞吐量。

items.en: Based on these findings, we introduce and open-source LongCat-Flash-Lite, a model trained from scratch with 68.5B total parameters and 2.9B∼\sim4.5B activated parameters depending on the context. Our evaluation demonstrates that LongCat-Flash-Lite not only surpasses a parameter-equivalent MoE baseline—validating the superior efficacy of allocating over 30B parameters to embeddings rather than experts—but also exhibits competitive performance against existing models of similar scale, particularly in agentic and coding tasks.
items.zh: 基于这些发现，我们推出并开源了LongCat-Flash-Lite，一个从零训练的模型，总参数685亿，根据上下文激活参数29亿至45亿。我们的评估表明，LongCat-Flash-Lite不仅超越了参数等效的MoE基线——验证了将超过300亿参数分配给嵌入而非专家的优越有效性——而且在智能体和编码任务中与现有同等规模模型相比表现出竞争力。

full.sec: 3 Comparative Analysis of Expert and Embedding Scaling
full.secZh: 3 专家与嵌入扩展的对比分析

items.en: This section presents our empirical findings regarding the comparison between scaling embeddings and scaling experts.
items.zh: 本节介绍我们关于缩放嵌入与缩放专家比较的实证发现。

items.en: We integrate N-gram Embedding into the Longcat-Flash architecture (Meituan, 2025) and conduct scaling experiments via from-scratch pre-training across varying activated parameter budgets (280M, 790M, and 1.3B). To rigorously compare scaling strategies, we establish a framework that contrasts scaling via N-gram Embedding against scaling experts. Specifically, for N-gram Embedding scaling, we first train MoE models with varying base sparsity levels ranging from 35% to 98% and incrementally incorporate N-gram Embedding from specific sparsity levels. Crucially, at each sparsity level, the N-gram Embedding model is paired with a parameter-equivalent MoE baseline, which attains the same total parameter count by increasing the number of experts. All models are pre-trained on a corpus of 300B tokens. We evaluate model performance by monitoring training loss and validation loss on two meticulously constructed datasets, covering both Chinese and English.
items.zh: 我们将N-gram嵌入集成到Longcat-Flash架构中（美团，2025），并通过从零预训练在不同激活参数预算（2.8亿、7.9亿和13亿）下进行缩放实验。为严格比较缩放策略，我们建立了一个对比N-gram嵌入缩放与专家缩放的框架。具体来说，对于N-gram嵌入缩放，我们首先训练具有不同基础稀疏性水平（从35%到98%）的MoE模型，并从特定稀疏性水平开始逐步加入N-gram嵌入。关键的是，在每个稀疏性水平上，N-gram嵌入模型与一个参数等效的MoE基线配对，该基线通过增加专家数量达到相同的总参数数量。所有模型在3000亿token的语料库上进行预训练。我们通过监测训练损失和两个精心构建的数据集上的验证损失来评估模型性能，这两个数据集涵盖中文和英文。

full.sec: 3.1 Optimal Timing for N-gram Embedding Integration
full.secZh: 3.1 N元嵌入集成的最佳时机

items.en: A pivotal finding is that the scaling dynamics of N-gram Embedding diverge markedly depending on the sparsity level of the base model. Figure 2 presents three distinct scaling trajectories111We utilize the ratio of total parameters to activated parameters on the x-axis as a proxy for sparsity.: the standard MoE baseline (blue), N-gram Embedding applied to a base model with a low parameter ratio (green), and N-gram Embedding applied to a base model with a high parameter ratio (red).
items.zh: 一个关键发现是，N-gram嵌入的缩放动态根据基础模型的稀疏性水平显著不同。图2展示了三种不同的缩放轨迹¹：标准MoE基线（蓝色）、应用于低参数比基础模型的N-gram嵌入（绿色），以及应用于高参数比基础模型的N-gram嵌入（红色）。

items.capEn: Figure 2: The scaling curve of MoE model and N-gram Embedding (NE) model. The horizontal axis is the ratio of total parameters to the activated parameters (280M). The axes of Figures on the right panel is converted to a logarithmic scale. For the two NE curves, we prepend a dashed line to connect the corresponding base MoE model without NE.
items.capZh: 图2：MoE模型和N-gram嵌入（NE）模型的缩放曲线。横轴是总参数与激活参数（2.8亿）的比值。右侧面板的坐标轴转换为对数刻度。对于两条NE曲线，我们添加了一条虚线连接相应的无NE的基础MoE模型。

items.en: The figure illustrates that the MoE scaling curve adheres to a strict log-linear relationship. This implies that in low-ratio regimes, a marginal increase in the number of experts yields a substantial reduction in loss. Conversely, at higher ratios, achieving an equivalent loss reduction necessitates a significantly larger increase in expert parameters. Consequently, when N-gram Embedding is introduced at low parameter ratios, its scaling advantage fails to surpass the gains obtained by simply increasing the number of experts. In contrast, at high sparsity levels, the benefits of N-gram Embedding become significantly more pronounced. This observation leads to the following design principle regarding the incorporation of N-gram Embedding.
items.zh: 该图表明，MoE缩放曲线遵循严格的线性对数关系。这意味着在低比值区间，专家数量的边际增加会带来损失的显著降低。相反，在较高比值下，实现等效的损失降低需要显著更大的专家参数增加。因此，当N-gram嵌入在低参数比时引入，其缩放优势无法超过单纯增加专家数量所带来的收益。相比之下，在高稀疏性水平下，N-gram嵌入的益处变得显著更明显。这一观察导致了关于N-gram嵌入引入的以下设计原则。

items.en: This result indicates that embedding scaling could be a promising scaling dimension orthogonal to expert scaling.
items.zh: 该结果表明，嵌入缩放可能是一个与专家缩放正交的有前景的缩放维度。

items.en: A closer inspection of Figure 2 reveals a distinct intersection between the blue and red curves: as the parameter ratio increases, the performance advantage of N-gram Embedding gradually diminishes and is eventually surpassed by the MoE baseline. This indicates that when a model allocates an excessive proportion of its parameter budget to N-gram Embedding, its performance becomes inferior to that of parameter-equivalent MoE baselines. This observation aligns with conclusions drawn in the concurrent work Engram (Cheng et al., 2026), which posits that the loss follows a U-shaped scaling curve as a function of the N-gram Embedding proportion. In Figure 2, the intersection point lies slightly above a ratio of 20. At this juncture, N-gram Embedding parameters constitute approximately 50% of the total parameter count (given that the base MoE model maintains a ratio of 12). Consequently, we derive a second principle from this phenomenon:
items.zh: 仔细观察图2可以发现蓝色和红色曲线之间存在一个明显的交点：随着参数比例的增加，N-gram Embedding的性能优势逐渐减弱，最终被MoE基线超越。这表明，当模型将过多参数预算分配给N-gram Embedding时，其性能会低于参数等价的MoE基线。这一观察结果与同期工作Engram（Cheng等人，2026）的结论一致，该工作认为损失随N-gram Embedding比例呈U形缩放曲线。在图2中，交点略高于比例20。此时，N-gram Embedding参数约占总参数数的50%（因为基础MoE模型的比例为12）。因此，我们从这一现象中得出第二条原则：

items.en: In the context of N-gram Embedding, hash collisions force a single embedding vector to superimpose the semantics of multiple distinct n-grams. This collision-induced ambiguity impedes learning efficiency and consequently degrades model performance. We identify that selecting an appropriate vocabulary size is critical to mitigating high collision rates. During training, we observed that N-gram Embedding exhibits anomalously high hash collision rates at specific vocabulary sizes, particularly for 2-gram hashing. To investigate the underlying mechanics, we conduct a dual analysis focusing on: (1) Vocabulary Hit Rate, defined as the proportion of vocabulary entries activated at least once by the pre-training corpus; and (2) Hash Collisions, which quantifies the loss of unique token representation due to modulo-based indexing.
items.zh: 在N-gram Embedding的背景下，哈希冲突迫使单个嵌入向量叠加多个不同n-gram的语义。这种冲突引起的歧义阻碍了学习效率，从而降低了模型性能。我们发现选择合适的词汇量对于缓解高冲突率至关重要。在训练过程中，我们观察到N-gram Embedding在特定词汇量下表现出异常高的哈希冲突率，尤其是对于2-gram哈希。为了研究其内在机制，我们进行了双重分析，重点关注：（1）词汇命中率，定义为预训练语料库至少激活一次的词汇条目比例；（2）哈希冲突，量化了由于基于模的索引导致的唯一词元表示损失。

items.en: For the hit rate analysis, we use an n-gram vocabulary size set to 30×30\times the base vocabulary (128k). For the collision analysis, we sample a range of vocabulary sizes between 30×30\times and 33×33\times the base vocabulary size, computing n-gram collision counts over 100 training sequences for each configuration. The results are detailed in Figure 3.
items.zh: 对于命中率分析，我们将n-gram词汇量设置为基础词汇量（128k）的30倍。对于冲突分析，我们在基础词汇量的30倍到33倍之间采样一系列词汇量，针对每种配置计算100个训练序列上的n-gram冲突计数。结果详见图3。

items.en: We now examine the sensitivity of model performance to the internal configurations of N-gram Embedding, namely the n-gram order NN and the number of sub-tables KK.
items.zh: 现在我们考察模型性能对N-gram Embedding内部配置的敏感性，即n-gram阶数N和子表数量K。

items.en: Regarding the n-gram order NN defined in Section 2, increasing NN enables N-gram Embedding to capture richer contextual semantics, theoretically yielding embedding vectors with enhanced representational capacity. However, this also creates an extremely sparse distribution over the n-gram vocabulary, as high-order n-grams appear infrequently. This sparsity significantly exacerbates the challenge of learning effective embeddings.
items.zh: 关于第2节中定义的n-gram阶数N，增加N使N-gram Embedding能够捕获更丰富的上下文语义，理论上产生具有更强表示能力的嵌入向量。然而，这也会在n-gram词汇表上造成极其稀疏的分布，因为高阶n-gram出现频率较低。这种稀疏性显著加剧了学习有效嵌入的挑战。

items.en: Regarding the number of sub-tables KK, this parameter governs the number of distinct hash functions applied to each n-gram, thereby substantially mitigating the probability of hash collisions. Nevertheless, empirical evidence suggests that increasing KK beyond a certain threshold yields diminishing returns.
items.zh: 关于子表数量K，该参数控制应用于每个n-gram的不同哈希函数数量，从而显著降低哈希冲突的概率。然而，经验证据表明，将K增加到超过某个阈值后，收益递减。

items.en: Utilizing the 790M activated-parameter model (corresponding to the initial data point on the red curve in Figure 6(a)), we conduct ablation studies across various combinations of NN and KK222For large NN, numerical overflow during hash computation can be circumvented by applying the modulus operation prior to exponentiation.. The results are summarized in Figure 4. It is evident that when both NN and KK are set to their minimal values (N=2N=2 and K=1K=1), the model exhibits notably inferior performance. Conversely, for N≥3N\geq 3 and K≥2K\geq 2, the performance variance across different configurations becomes relatively small, indicating that the model is robust to hyperparameter selection within this regime. Empirically, we observe that setting NN in the range of 3 to 5 consistently yields near-optimal performance.
items.zh: 利用790M激活参数模型（对应于图6(a)中红色曲线的初始数据点），我们在N和K的不同组合下进行消融研究。结果总结在图4中。显然，当N和K都设置为最小值（N=2且K=1）时，模型性能明显较差。相反，对于N≥3且K≥2，不同配置之间的性能差异相对较小，表明模型在此超参数选择范围内具有鲁棒性。根据经验，我们观察到将N设置在3到5之间始终能产生接近最优的性能。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Comparison of training and validation loss under different combinations of NN and KK.
items.capZh: 图4：不同N和K组合下训练损失和验证损失的比较。

items.en: In our preliminary experiments, we observed that suboptimal initialization of the embedding module can severely impede the efficacy of N-gram Embedding, preventing it from realizing its full potential. To validate this hypothesis, we revisited an early vanilla experiment configured as per Figure 2, but without any specific adjustments to the embedding module. After pre-training on 300B tokens, we compute the L2 norms of each module’s output and its corresponding residual branch (identity path) across all layers, plotting the norms and their ratios in Figure 5.
items.zh: 在我们的初步实验中，我们观察到嵌入模块的次优初始化会严重阻碍N-gram Embedding的效果，使其无法充分发挥潜力。为了验证这一假设，我们重新审视了一个早期的普通实验，其配置如图2所示，但未对嵌入模块进行任何特定调整。在300B词元上预训练后，我们计算所有层中每个模块输出及其对应残差分支（恒等路径）的L2范数，并将范数及其比值绘制在图5中。

items.en: In our early experiments, we find that suboptimal embedding initialization can significantly hinder the contribution of N-gram Embedding, preventing it from fully realizing its potential. To validate this hypothesis, we analyze an early vanilla experiment, which follows the configuration in Figure 2 but does not apply any adjustments to the embedding module. After training on 300B tokens, we plot, for all layers, the L2 norms of each module’s output and its corresponding identity branch, as well as the ratio between these two norms, as shown in Figure 5.
items.zh: 在我们的早期实验中，我们发现次优的嵌入初始化会显著阻碍N-gram Embedding的贡献，使其无法充分发挥潜力。为了验证这一假设，我们分析了一个早期的普通实验，该实验遵循图2中的配置，但未对嵌入模块进行任何调整。在300B词元上训练后，我们绘制了所有层中每个模块输出及其对应恒等分支的L2范数，以及这两个范数之间的比值，如图5所示。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Layer-wise analysis of L2 norms for module outputs versus their corresponding identity branches, alongside the ratio of these norms. Each shortcut layer comprises two sub-layers, denoted by suffixes 0 and 1.
items.capZh: 图5：模块输出与其对应恒等分支的L2范数逐层分析，以及这些范数的比值。每个快捷层包含两个子层，分别用后缀0和1表示。

items.en: To mitigate this issue, we explore two strategies:
items.zh: 为了缓解这一问题，我们探索了两种策略：

items.en: Scaling Factor: Introducing a scaling factor (typically D\sqrt{D}) to the embedding output to ensure a sufficient contribution to the forward pass.
items.zh: 缩放因子：在嵌入输出中引入缩放因子（通常为D的平方根），以确保对前向传播有足够的贡献。

items.en: Normalization: Applying LayerNorm to the embedding output prior to merging with the residual branch. This similarly amplifies the embedding contribution, as LayerNorm enforces unit variance during the early stages of training.
items.zh: 归一化：在嵌入输出与残差分支合并之前对其应用LayerNorm。这同样放大了嵌入贡献，因为LayerNorm在训练早期强制单位方差。

items.en: Both techniques were originally proposed in Takase et al. (2025) with the primary objective of increasing residual branch variance to bound backward gradients and stabilize training. In our context, while we observed no significant impact on training stability, these methods—collectively termed Embedding Amplification—substantially enhance the performance of N-gram Embedding. In our experiments, applying Embedding Amplification yields superior performance compared to the vanilla baseline, with a consistent reduction of 0.02 in both the training loss and the two validation losses.
items.zh: 这两种技术最初由Takase等人（2025）提出，主要目的是增加残差分支方差以限制反向梯度并稳定训练。在我们的上下文中，虽然我们观察到对训练稳定性没有显著影响，但这些方法（统称为嵌入放大）显著提升了N-gram Embedding的性能。在我们的实验中，应用嵌入放大相比普通基线取得了更优的性能，训练损失和两个验证损失均持续降低0.02。

full.sec: 3.3 Scaling Properties across Model Width and Depth
full.secZh: 3.3 模型宽度与深度的扩展特性

items.en: This section investigates how the efficacy of N-gram embedding scaling evolves with increasing model width.
items.zh: 本节研究N-gram嵌入缩放的效果如何随模型宽度增加而变化。

items.en: We conduct a series of scaling experiments at two larger activation scales (790M and 1.3B parameters), with model depth held constant (10 shortcut layers) while only the width (hidden size and module dimensions) varies. Figure 6 presents the resulting scaling curves. Our analysis reveals two key trends:
items.zh: 我们在两个更大的激活规模（790M和1.3B参数）下进行了一系列缩放实验，模型深度保持不变（10个快捷层），仅宽度（隐藏大小和模块维度）变化。图6展示了由此产生的缩放曲线。我们的分析揭示了两个关键趋势：

items.en: When incorporated at an appropriate ratio, N-gram Embedding consistently yields a lower loss compared to a parameter-equivalent MoE baseline. This advantage gradually diminishes as the proportion of N-gram Embedding parameters increases, mirroring the behavior observed in Figure 2.
items.zh: 当以适当比例引入时，N-gram Embedding 始终比参数等价的 MoE 基线获得更低的损失。随着 N-gram Embedding 参数比例的增加，这一优势逐渐减弱，与图 2 中观察到的行为一致。

items.en: Crucially, the intersection point between the N-gram Embedding curve and the MoE curve systematically shifts towards higher total-to-activated parameter ratios as the model width (activation size) increases. Specifically, for a 280M activation size, N-gram Embedding consistently underperforms its MoE counterpart once the ratio exceeds 30. At 790M, N-gram Embedding only underperforms on the English validation set at this ratio, while maintaining an advantage on all other metrics. Notably, at a 1.3B activation size, N-gram Embedding retains a clear advantage even at ratios as high as 50.
items.zh: 关键的是，随着模型宽度（激活大小）增加，N-gram Embedding 曲线与 MoE 曲线的交点系统性地向更高的总参数与激活参数比移动。具体而言，对于 280M 激活大小，一旦比例超过 30，N-gram Embedding 始终不如其 MoE 对应物。在 790M 时，N-gram Embedding 仅在此比例下在英文验证集上表现较差，而在所有其他指标上保持优势。值得注意的是，在 1.3B 激活大小时，即使比例高达 50，N-gram Embedding 仍保持明显优势。

items.en: These findings demonstrate that wider models allow for a significantly expanded window of opportunity to leverage N-gram Embedding effectively. Consequently, Figure 6 leads to the following conclusion: for a fixed number of layers,
items.zh: 这些发现表明，更宽的模型允许显著扩大有效利用 N-gram Embedding 的机会窗口。因此，图 6 得出以下结论：对于固定层数，

items.en: We now investigate the impact of model depth on the efficacy of N-gram Embedding scaling. For pre-normalization architectures, the contribution of N-gram Embedding through the identity connection (residual branch) inherently diminishes as network depth increases, as the signal propagating through skip connections carries less direct information from earlier layers (also shown in Figure 5).
items.zh: 我们现在研究模型深度对 N-gram Embedding 缩放有效性的影响。对于预归一化架构，通过恒等连接（残差分支）的 N-gram Embedding 贡献随着网络深度增加而固有地减弱，因为通过跳跃连接传播的信号携带来自早期层的直接信息较少（如图 5 所示）。

items.en: To probe this hypothesis, we conducted scaling experiments using deeper architectures, building upon our 1.3B activated parameter configuration. Specifically, we trained models with 20 and 40 layers while meticulously maintaining a consistent relative proportion of N-gram Embedding parameters ( 50% of the total parameters) across all tested depths.
items.zh: 为了探究这一假设，我们在 1.3B 激活参数配置的基础上，使用更深架构进行了缩放实验。具体而言，我们训练了具有 20 层和 40 层的模型，同时精心保持所有测试深度下 N-gram Embedding 参数的相对比例一致（占总参数的 50%）。

items.en: Note that the majority of current practical language models typically operate below 40 shortcut layers (equivalent to 80 conventional layers). Given our finding that increased width consistently amplifies N-gram Embedding’s advantage, and its robust performance even at 40 layers, scaling n-gram embeddings up within these common architectural depths is likely to yield even greater performance gains.
items.zh: 请注意，当前大多数实际语言模型通常运行在 40 个快捷层（相当于 80 个传统层）以下。鉴于我们发现增加的宽度持续放大 N-gram Embedding 的优势，并且即使在 40 层时其性能依然稳健，在这些常见架构深度内扩展 n-gram 嵌入很可能会带来更大的性能提升。

items.en: The N-gram Embedding mechanism effectively redistributes parameters from the MoE layers to the embedding space. This architectural transformation maintains the total model parameters while reducing the number of activated parameters within MoE layers—particularly advantageous in memory I/O-bound decoding scenarios with large token counts. Moreover, the increased size of the embedding layer does not penalize latency, as the computational cost of embedding lookups scales with the number of input tokens rather than the total number of embedding parameters.
items.zh: N-gram Embedding 机制有效地将参数从 MoE 层重新分配到嵌入空间。这种架构转换在保持总模型参数的同时，减少了 MoE 层内的激活参数数量——这在具有大量 token 的内存 I/O 受限解码场景中尤其有利。此外，嵌入层大小的增加不会惩罚延迟，因为嵌入查找的计算成本与输入 token 数量成正比，而非嵌入参数总数。

items.en: To fully capitalize on the efficiency gains from reduced active parameters, it is crucial to maximize hardware utilization through a large batch size (as shown in Figure 8(a)). This requirement creates a natural synergy with speculative decoding. Multi-step speculative decoding effectively expands the “effective batch size”, thereby converting the theoretical advantage of parameter sparsity into tangible inference speedups.
items.zh: 为了充分利用减少激活参数带来的效率提升，通过大批量大小最大化硬件利用率至关重要（如图 8(a) 所示）。这一要求与推测解码自然协同。多步推测解码有效扩展了“有效批量大小”，从而将参数稀疏性的理论优势转化为实际的推理加速。

items.en: Although reallocating parameters from experts to N-gram Embedding effectively reduces memory I/O for MoE layers, it introduces additional overhead in terms of I/O, computation, and communication compared to a standard embedding layer. Minimizing the latency and resource consumption of N-gram Embedding is therefore critical for overall system efficiency. Furthermore, the dynamic and complex scheduling mechanisms inherent in modern inference frameworks make it difficult to pre-determine the exact token sequences for the forward pass, which complicates the optimization of N-gram embedding lookups.
items.zh: 尽管将参数从专家层重新分配到 N-gram Embedding 有效减少了 MoE 层的内存 I/O，但与标准嵌入层相比，它引入了额外的 I/O、计算和通信开销。因此，最小化 N-gram Embedding 的延迟和资源消耗对于整体系统效率至关重要。此外，现代推理框架中固有的动态和复杂调度机制使得难以预先确定前向传递的确切 token 序列，这使 N-gram 嵌入查找的优化复杂化。

items.en: To address these challenges, we introduce the N-gram Cache, a specialized caching mechanism inspired by the design principles of the KV cache. We implement custom CUDA kernels to manage N-gram IDs directly on the device, facilitating low-overhead synchronization with the intricate scheduling logic of various inference optimization techniques. This design significantly enhances the computational efficiency of N-gram embeddings.
items.zh: 为了解决这些挑战，我们引入了 N-gram Cache，这是一种受 KV 缓存设计原理启发的专用缓存机制。我们实现自定义 CUDA 内核以直接在设备上管理 N-gram ID，促进与各种推理优化技术的复杂调度逻辑的低开销同步。该设计显著提高了 N-gram 嵌入的计算效率。

items.en: In speculative decoding scenarios, where the draft model typically operates with fewer layers and substantially lower latency, the overhead of N-gram Embedding becomes relatively more pronounced. To mitigate this, we propose two complementary optimization strategies: (1) employing a conventional embedding layer for the draft model to bypass the more computationally expensive n-gram lookup; and (2) caching n-gram embeddings during the drafting phase to eliminate redundant computations during the subsequent verification step. These optimizations collectively reduce latency and improve throughput in speculative inference settings.
items.zh: 在推测解码场景中，草稿模型通常以更少的层数和显著更低的延迟运行，N-gram Embedding 的开销变得相对更明显。为了缓解这一问题，我们提出了两种互补的优化策略：(1) 对草稿模型使用传统嵌入层，以绕过计算成本更高的 n-gram 查找；(2) 在草稿阶段缓存 n-gram 嵌入，以消除后续验证步骤中的冗余计算。这些优化共同降低了推测推理设置中的延迟并提高了吞吐量。

full.sec: 4.3 Rethinking N-gram Embedding Optimization: The Role of Speculative Decoding
full.secZh: 4.3 重新思考N元嵌入优化：推测解码的作用

items.en: Beyond hardware efficiency, we posit that the N-gram Embedding structure inherently encodes rich local context and token co-occurrence information, offering unexplored synergies with speculative decoding. We identify two promising directions where the semantic richness of N-gram Embedding could potentially be leveraged to further accelerate inference.
items.zh: 除了硬件效率，我们假设 N-gram Embedding 结构固有地编码了丰富的局部上下文和 token 共现信息，提供了与推测解码尚未探索的协同作用。我们确定了两个有前景的方向，其中 N-gram Embedding 的语义丰富性可能被利用来进一步加速推理。

items.en: N-gram Embedding based drafting: Since the N-gram Embedding aggregates information from the preceding N-1 tokens, it implicitly captures short-range dependencies. We are currently exploring architectures to repurpose the N-gram embedding as an ultra-fast draft model. While a primary candidate involves attaching a lightweight linear projection directly to the N-gram Embedding outputs, we are investigating a broader design space to fully exploit the captured local context for efficient token prediction.
items.zh: 基于 N-gram Embedding 的草稿：由于 N-gram Embedding 聚合了前 N-1 个 token 的信息，它隐式捕获了短程依赖。我们目前正在探索将 N-gram 嵌入重新用作超快草稿模型的架构。虽然一个主要候选方案是将轻量级线性投影直接附加到 N-gram Embedding 输出，但我们正在研究更广泛的设计空间，以充分利用捕获的局部上下文进行高效 token 预测。

items.en: Early rejection: The N-gram Embedding representation could also serve as a semantic consistency check (or confidence estimator) for tokens generated by external draft models. Draft tokens that result in low-probability match under N-gram Embedding might be "early-rejected" before entering the expensive verification phase of the target model. Theoretically, this pruning strategy would reduce the workload of the verification step, offering a pathway to further optimize end-to-end latency.
items.zh: 早期拒绝：N-gram Embedding 表示还可以作为外部草稿模型生成的 token 的语义一致性检查（或置信度估计器）。在 N-gram Embedding 下导致低概率匹配的草稿 token 可能在进入目标模型昂贵的验证阶段之前被“早期拒绝”。理论上，这种剪枝策略将减少验证步骤的工作量，为进一步优化端到端延迟提供途径。

items.en: As mentioned in Section 1, Per-Layer Embedding (PLE) is another way to scale parameters by allocating embedding parameters across layers. This section provides a direct comparison between N-gram Embedding and PLE, and introduces an attempt to integrate both approaches.
items.zh: 如第1节所述，逐层嵌入（PLE）是通过跨层分配嵌入参数来扩展参数的另一种方式。本节对N-gram嵌入与PLE进行直接比较，并介绍一种整合两种方法的尝试。

items.en: PLE is applied in Google DeepMind (2024) and further studied in Sadhukhan et al. (2026). PLE directly substitutes the output of up-projection matrix in the SwiGLU module with the embedding output, which is the most efficient method for injecting embedding information in our experiments. Let xi(l)x^{(l)}_{i} be the ii-th input vector of the FFN module in layer ll, the FFN output with PLE can be formalized as follows
items.zh: PLE在Google DeepMind (2024)中应用，并在Sadhukhan等人(2026)中进一步研究。PLE直接将SwiGLU模块中上投影矩阵的输出替换为嵌入输出，这是我们在实验中最有效的嵌入信息注入方法。令 xi(l)x^{(l)}_{i} 为第 ll 层FFN模块的第 ii 个输入向量，则带PLE的FFN输出可形式化如下

items.en: where Wd(l)W_{d}^{(l)} and Wg(l)W^{(l)}_{g} denote the down-projection and gate-projection matrices of layer ll respectively, and E0(l)E_{0}^{(l)} is the embedding table of layer ll, with identical shape to the base embedding table in Eq. 1.
items.zh: 其中 Wd(l)W_{d}^{(l)} 和 Wg(l)W^{(l)}_{g} 分别表示第 ll 层的下投影和门控投影矩阵，E0(l)E_{0}^{(l)} 是第 ll 层的嵌入表，其形状与公式1中的基础嵌入表相同。

items.en: Building upon PLE, we propose Per-Layer N-gram Embedding (PLNE), a novel extension that replaces the base embedding outputs with N-gram Embedding outputs at each layer, thereby enabling more flexible and targeted parameter scaling within the MoE framework. PLNE can be written as
items.zh: 在PLE的基础上，我们提出逐层N-gram嵌入（PLNE），这是一种新颖的扩展，将每层的基础嵌入输出替换为N-gram嵌入输出，从而在MoE框架内实现更灵活和有针对性的参数扩展。PLNE可写为

items.en: where ei(l)e^{(l)}_{i} is computed according to Eq. 3, with layer-specific embedding table and projection matrix.
items.zh: 其中 ei(l)e^{(l)}_{i} 根据公式3计算，使用逐层特定的嵌入表和投影矩阵。

items.en: For both PLE and PLNE, embedding information is injected exclusively into the MLP within the dense sub-layer of each shortcut layer. Since each PLNE layer incorporates an n-gram vocabulary in addition to the base vocabulary, it introduces a larger number of parameters per layer compared to PLE. To avoid confounding factors related to layer positioning, we do not directly compare between PLE and PLNE under equivalent total parameter counts. Instead, we evaluate PLE and PLNE against their respective parameter-equivalent N-gram Embedding (NE) baselines, as illustrated in Figure 9.
items.zh: 对于PLE和PLNE，嵌入信息仅注入每个快捷层稠密子层中的MLP。由于每个PLNE层除了基础词汇表外还包含一个n-gram词汇表，因此与PLE相比，每层引入的参数数量更多。为避免与层位置相关的混淆因素，我们不在等效总参数计数下直接比较PLE和PLNE。相反，我们将PLE和PLNE分别与其参数等效的N-gram嵌入（NE）基线进行比较，如图9所示。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Loss comparison of N-gram Embedding (NE), PLE, and PLNE under the 790M activated-parameter setting. Note that PLE and PLNE are compared against NE at two distinct parameter scales.
items.capZh: 图9：在790M激活参数设置下，N-gram嵌入（NE）、PLE和PLNE的损失比较。注意，PLE和PLNE在两个不同的参数规模上与NE进行比较。

items.en: Leveraging the insights from our previous analysis, we introduce LongCat-Flash-Lite, a model trained from scratch with integrated N-gram Embedding. LongCat-Flash-Lite undergoes a complete pipeline of pre-training, mid-training, and supervised finetuning, and demonstrates highly competitive performance for its scale.
items.zh: 利用先前分析中的见解，我们引入了LongCat-Flash-Lite，这是一个从头开始训练并集成了N-gram嵌入的模型。LongCat-Flash-Lite经历了完整的预训练、中期训练和监督微调流程，并展示了其规模下极具竞争力的性能。

items.en: LongCat-Flash-Lite adopts the same architecture as Longcat-Flash (Meituan, 2025), with a total of 14 shortcut layers. It has 68.5 billion total parameters and dynamically activates between 2.9B and 4.5B parameters per token due to the zero-experts. In each shortcut layer, the MoE module consists of 256 FFN experts and 128 zero-experts, and each token selects 12 experts. For embedding module, LongCat-Flash-Lite includes 31.4B N-gram Embedding parameters, accounting for 46% of the total.
items.zh: LongCat-Flash-Lite采用与Longcat-Flash（美团，2025）相同的架构，共有14个快捷层。它拥有685亿总参数，由于零专家，每个词元动态激活29亿至45亿参数。在每个快捷层中，MoE模块由256个FFN专家和128个零专家组成，每个词元选择12个专家。对于嵌入模块，LongCat-Flash-Lite包含314亿N-gram嵌入参数，占总参数的46%。

items.en: LongCat-Flash-Lite follows the same data recipe with LongCat-Flash-Chat (Meituan, 2025). It is first pre-trained on 11T tokens with a sequence length of 8k, followed by 1.5T tokens of mid-training during which the sequence length is extended to 128k, and is finally trained on SFT data. To support extended context, we implement YARN (Peng et al., 2023) during the 32k sequence length training stage, enabling LongCat-Flash-Lite to handle sequences up to 256k tokens.
items.zh: LongCat-Flash-Lite遵循与LongCat-Flash-Chat（美团，2025）相同的数据方案。它首先在11T词元上进行预训练，序列长度为8k，随后进行1.5T词元的中期训练，期间序列长度扩展到128k，最后在SFT数据上进行训练。为支持长上下文，我们在32k序列长度训练阶段实现了YARN（Peng等人，2023），使LongCat-Flash-Lite能够处理长达256k词元的序列。

items.en: We train an MoE baseline with exactly the same parameters as LongCat-Flash-Lite (referred to as LongCat-Flash-Lite-Vanilla) by converting all N-gram Embedding parameters into additional experts. Both models undergo identical training strategy and data recipe.
items.zh: 我们训练了一个与LongCat-Flash-Lite参数完全相同的MoE基线（称为LongCat-Flash-Lite-Vanilla），方法是将所有N-gram嵌入参数转换为额外的专家。两个模型采用相同的训练策略和数据方案。

items.en: Throughout training, LongCat-Flash-Lite consistently achieves lower training loss compared to LongCat-Flash-Lite-Vanilla, as illustrated in Figure 10. To assess downstream performance, we evaluate both models on benchmarks spanning three core capability domains:
items.zh: 在整个训练过程中，LongCat-Flash-Lite始终比LongCat-Flash-Lite-Vanilla实现更低的训练损失，如图10所示。为了评估下游性能，我们在涵盖三个核心能力领域的基准上评估了两个模型：

items.en: General Tasks: MMLU (Hendrycks et al., 2021), MMLU-Pro (Wang et al., 2024), C-Eval (Huang et al., 2023), and CMMLU (Li et al., 2023).
items.zh: 通用任务：MMLU（Hendrycks等人，2021）、MMLU-Pro（Wang等人，2024）、C-Eval（Huang等人，2023）和CMMLU（Li等人，2023）。

items.en: Reasoning Tasks: BBH (Suzgun et al., 2023), GPQA (M-A-P Team, ByteDance., 2025), DROP (Dua et al., 2019) and GSM8K (Cobbe et al., 2021).
items.zh: 推理任务：BBH（Suzgun等人，2023）、GPQA（M-A-P团队，字节跳动，2025）、DROP（Dua等人，2019）和GSM8K（Cobbe等人，2021）。

items.en: Coding Tasks: HumanEval+ (Liu et al., 2024), MultiPL-E (Cassano et al., 2022), and BigCodeBench (Zhuo et al., 2025).
items.zh: 编码任务：HumanEval+（Liu等人，2024）、MultiPL-E（Cassano等人，2022）和BigCodeBench（Zhuo等人，2025）。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Smoothed training loss curves of LongCat-Flash-Lite and LongCat-Flash-Lite-Vanilla. The loss drop at 420B tokens coincides with the batch size increases.
items.capZh: 图10：LongCat-Flash-Lite和LongCat-Flash-Lite-Vanilla的平滑训练损失曲线。在420B词元处的损失下降与批次大小增加同时发生。

items.en: As detailed in Table 1, LongCat-Flash-Lite demonstrates substantial performance improvements over LongCat-Flash-Lite-Vanilla across the majority of benchmarks in all three domains. These findings validate our earlier analysis: when sparsity reaches sufficient levels, strategically scaling total parameters through N-gram Embedding—while maintaining an optimal proportion of embedding parameters—consistently outperforms approaches that merely increase expert numbers.
items.zh: 如表1所示，LongCat-Flash-Lite在所有三个领域的大多数基准上均表现出比LongCat-Flash-Lite-Vanilla显著的性能提升。这些发现验证了我们之前的分析：当稀疏性达到足够水平时，通过N-gram嵌入策略性地扩展总参数——同时保持嵌入参数的最佳比例——始终优于仅增加专家数量的方法。

items.en: The evaluation of the chat model covers several core capabilities: agentic tool use tasks, agentic coding tasks, general domain tasks and mathematical reasoning tasks. The benchmarks used for assessment include:
items.zh: 聊天模型的评估涵盖几个核心能力：智能体式工具使用任务、智能体式编码任务、通用领域任务和数学推理任务。用于评估的基准包括：

items.en: Agentic Tool Use Tasks: τ2\tau^{2} Bench (Barres et al., 2025), Vita Bench (He et al., 2025). For τ2\tau^{2}-Bench, we use a revised version333https://github.com/AGI-Eval-Official/tau2-bench-revised to perform our evaluation because the original version contains noisy data.
items.zh: 智能体式工具使用任务：τ2\tau^{2} Bench（Barres等人，2025）、Vita Bench（He等人，2025）。对于τ2\tau^{2}-Bench，我们使用修订版333https://github.com/AGI-Eval-Official/tau2-bench-revised进行评估，因为原始版本包含噪声数据。

items.en: Agentic Coding Tasks: SWE-Bench (Jimenez et al., 2023), TerminalBench (Merrill et al., 2026), SWE-Bench Multiligual (Yang et al., 2025), and PRDBench (Fu et al., 2025).
items.zh: 智能体式编码任务：SWE-Bench（Jimenez等人，2023）、TerminalBench（Merrill等人，2026）、SWE-Bench多语言（Yang等人，2025）和PRDBench（Fu等人，2025）。

items.en: General Domain Tasks: GPQA-Diamond (Rein et al., 2024), MMLU (Hendrycks et al., 2021), MMLU-Pro (Wang et al., 2024), C-Eval (Huang et al., 2023), and CMMLU (Li et al., 2023).
items.zh: 通用领域任务：GPQA-Diamond (Rein et al., 2024)、MMLU (Hendrycks et al., 2021)、MMLU-Pro (Wang et al., 2024)、C-Eval (Huang et al., 2023) 和 CMMLU (Li et al., 2023)。

items.en: Mathematical Reasoning Tasks: MATH500 (Lightman et al., 2023), AIME24 (MAA, 2024), AIME25 (MAA, 2025).
items.zh: 数学推理任务：MATH500 (Lightman et al., 2023)、AIME24 (MAA, 2024)、AIME25 (MAA, 2025)。

items.en: Agentic Tool Use. LongCat-Flash-Lite excels in agentic tool use tasks, establishing a clear lead over all comparison models. In the τ2\tau^{2}-Bench benchmark, it achieves the highest scores across all three sub-scenarios: Telecom (72.8), Retail (73.1), and Airline (58.0). Notably, in the Telecom scenario, its score significantly outperforms Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite and Kimi-Linear-48B-A3B. This highlights its superior ability to handle complex dependencies on tools and domain-specific task execution. In VitaBench, it achieves a score of 7.00, outperforming Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct (5.80), and Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite (4.50). This leading score underscores LongCat-Flash-Lite’s superior ability to handle complex, real-world task workflows via tool integration in practical business scenarios.
items.zh: 智能体工具使用。LongCat-Flash-Lite 在智能体工具使用任务中表现出色，在所有对比模型中建立了明显领先优势。在 τ2\tau^{2}-Bench 基准测试中，它在所有三个子场景中均获得最高分：电信（72.8）、零售（73.1）和航空（58.0）。值得注意的是，在电信场景中，其得分显著优于 Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite 和 Kimi-Linear-48B-A3B。这突显了它在处理工具复杂依赖关系和特定领域任务执行方面的卓越能力。在 VitaBench 中，它获得 7.00 分，优于 Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct（5.80）和 Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite（4.50）。这一领先分数凸显了 LongCat-Flash-Lite 在实际业务场景中通过工具集成处理复杂真实世界任务工作流的卓越能力。

items.en: Agentic Coding. In coding-related tasks, LongCat-Flash-Lite demonstrates remarkable practical problem-solving capabilities. In SWE-Bench, it achieves an accuracy of 54.4, outperforming all baselines—surpassing Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct (37.6), Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite (41.3), and Kimi-Linear-48B-A3B (32.8) by a significant margin. This indicates its proficiency in solving real-world software engineering issues, including bug fixes and feature implementation. In TerminalBench, which evaluates terminal command execution competence, LongCat-Flash-Lite secures a leading score of 33.75, far exceeding Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct (15.19), Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite (20.0) and Kimi-Linear-48B-A3B (20.0), reflecting its robust ability to understand and execute terminal-related instructions critical for developer-centric agentic applications. Additionally, in SWE-Bench Multilingual—a benchmark designed to measure cross-language programming generalization across diverse software ecosystems—LongCat-Flash-Lite achieves a strong accuracy of 38.10, outperforming Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct (31.3) and Kimi-Linear-48B-A3B (37.2), thus demonstrating its reliable adaptability to multi-language development scenarios. In PRDBench, LongCat-Flash-Lite achieves a score of 39.63, significantly outperforming Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct (15.36). We observe that our model can autonomously write unit tests to verify its development, producing higher-quality code repositories.
items.zh: 智能体编码。在编码相关任务中，LongCat-Flash-Lite 展现出卓越的实践问题解决能力。在 SWE-Bench 中，它达到 54.4 的准确率，显著优于所有基线——超过 Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct（37.6）、Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite（41.3）和 Kimi-Linear-48B-A3B（32.8）。这表明它擅长解决真实世界的软件工程问题，包括错误修复和功能实现。在评估终端命令执行能力的 TerminalBench 中，LongCat-Flash-Lite 以 33.75 的领先分数远超 Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct（15.19）、Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite（20.0）和 Kimi-Linear-48B-A3B（20.0），反映了其理解和执行终端相关指令的强大能力，这对以开发者为中心的智能体应用至关重要。此外，在衡量跨语言编程泛化能力的 SWE-Bench Multilingual 基准测试中，LongCat-Flash-Lite 达到 38.10 的准确率，优于 Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct（31.3）和 Kimi-Linear-48B-A3B（37.2），展示了其在多语言开发场景中的可靠适应性。在 PRDBench 中，LongCat-Flash-Lite 获得 39.63 分，显著优于 Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct（15.36）。我们观察到，我们的模型能够自主编写单元测试来验证其开发，从而生成更高质量的代码仓库。

items.en: General Domains. LongCat-Flash-Lite delivers balanced and competitive performance in general domain knowledge tasks. On MMLU, it scores 85.52, which is comparable to Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite (84.68) and Kimi-Linear-48B-A3B (79.91), and only slightly lower than Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct (89.28). In Chinese-specific benchmarks (CEval and CMMLU), it achieves 86.55 and 82.48 respectively, performing particularly well against Kimi-Linear-48B-A3B (78.48 and 76.26) and Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite (75.16 and 72.06). On GPQA-Diamond, it scores 66.78, maintaining competitiveness within the benchmark’s performance range. For MMLU-Pro, it achieves 78.29, demonstrating solid performance in handling more challenging multi-task language understanding questions.
items.zh: 通用领域。LongCat-Flash-Lite 在通用领域知识任务中表现均衡且具有竞争力。在 MMLU 上，它得分为 85.52，与 Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite（84.68）和 Kimi-Linear-48B-A3B（79.91）相当，仅略低于 Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct（89.28）。在中文特定基准测试（CEval 和 CMMLU）中，它分别达到 86.55 和 82.48，尤其优于 Kimi-Linear-48B-A3B（78.48 和 76.26）和 Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite（75.16 和 72.06）。在 GPQA-Diamond 上，它得分为 66.78，在该基准测试的性能范围内保持竞争力。对于 MMLU-Pro，它达到 78.29，在处理更具挑战性的多任务语言理解问题方面表现出稳健性能。

items.en: Mathematical Reasoning. LongCat-Flash-Lite exhibits strong mathematical reasoning capabilities across both basic and advanced tasks. On MATH500, it achieves an accuracy of 96.80, which is close to Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct (98.00), and outperforms Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite (95.20). In advanced mathematical competition benchmarks, it delivers impressive results: AIME24 (72.19) and AIME25 (63.23). These scores surpass Kimi-Linear-48B-A3B (70.52 and 59.58) and Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite (63.33 and 50.1), highlighting its ability to handle complex, multi-step mathematical deduction.
items.zh: 数学推理。LongCat-Flash-Lite 在基础任务和高级任务中均展现出强大的数学推理能力。在 MATH500 上，它达到 96.80 的准确率，接近 Qwen3-Next-80B-A3B-Instruct（98.00），并优于 Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite（95.20）。在高级数学竞赛基准测试中，它取得了令人印象深刻的结果：AIME24（72.19）和 AIME25（63.23）。这些分数超过了 Kimi-Linear-48B-A3B（70.52 和 59.58）和 Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite（63.33 和 50.1），突显了其处理复杂多步数学推理的能力。

items.en: As discussed in Section 4, the extreme activation sparsity of this model necessitates a large effective batch size to fully saturate GPU memory bandwidth. To achieve this, we deploy the model using “Eagle3” (Li et al., 2025) with a “3-step speculative decoding strategy”. Similarly to Qian et al. (2025) and Meituan (2025), we adopt wide EP (Expert Parallel) and SBO (Single Batch Overlap) to accelerate inference speed. While the above optimizations successfully expands the effective batch size, the model’s lightweight nature shifts the bottleneck towards kernel launch overheads, making it challenging to maintain high GPU occupancy. To address this and minimize end-to-end latency, we implement the following system-level optimizations:
items.zh: 如第 4 节所述，该模型的极端激活稀疏性需要较大的有效批量大小才能完全饱和 GPU 内存带宽。为此，我们使用“Eagle3”（Li et al., 2025）并采用“3 步推测解码策略”部署模型。与 Qian et al. (2025) 和 Meituan (2025) 类似，我们采用宽 EP（专家并行）和 SBO（单批重叠）来加速推理速度。虽然上述优化成功扩大了有效批量大小，但模型的轻量级特性将瓶颈转移到内核启动开销上，使得维持高 GPU 占用率变得具有挑战性。为了解决这一问题并最小化端到端延迟，我们实施了以下系统级优化：

items.en: Kernel Fusion: We apply extensive kernel fusion to reduce execution overhead and memory traffic. Specifically, all intra-TP-group communication operations are fused with subsequent fine-grained kernels (e.g., AllReduce + Residual Add + RMSNorm, AllGather + Q-Norm + KV-Norm, and ReduceScatter + RMSNorm + Hidden State Combine). For the quantized model, we integrate every activation quantization step into existing operators, including the aforementioned communication-fusion kernels and the SwiGLU component. Additionally, the processing of router logits (Softmax + TopK + router scaling) and zero-expert selection is consolidated into a single unified kernel.
items.zh: 内核融合：我们应用广泛的内核融合以减少执行开销和内存流量。具体来说，所有 TP 组内通信操作都与后续细粒度内核融合（例如，AllReduce + 残差加法 + RMSNorm、AllGather + Q-Norm + KV-Norm 以及 ReduceScatter + RMSNorm + 隐藏状态合并）。对于量化模型，我们将每个激活量化步骤集成到现有算子中，包括上述通信融合内核和 SwiGLU 组件。此外，路由器 logits 的处理（Softmax + TopK + 路由器缩放）和零专家选择被合并到一个统一的内核中。

items.en: Optimized Attention Combine: We employ a splitkv-and-combine strategy during decoding phase. When the number of KV splits is high, the combine operation can incur significant latency, sometimes comparable to the computation itself. By optimizing the combine kernel, we effectively reduce its latency by 50%.
items.zh: 优化注意力合并：我们在解码阶段采用 splitkv-and-combine 策略。当 KV 分割数量较多时，合并操作可能产生显著延迟，有时与计算本身相当。通过优化合并内核，我们有效地将其延迟降低了 50%。

items.en: We utilize PDL (NVIDIA, 2026) to allow dependent kernels to overlap their execution by triggering early launches. This mechanism not only eliminates the gaps between consecutive kernels but also improves SM utilization.
items.zh: 我们利用 PDL（NVIDIA, 2026）允许依赖内核通过提前启动来重叠执行。这种机制不仅消除了连续内核之间的间隙，还提高了 SM 利用率。

items.en: Building upon these optimizations, we achieve the exceptional inference performance illustrated in Figure 8(b).
items.zh: 基于这些优化，我们实现了图 8(b) 所示的卓越推理性能。

items.en: In this technical report, we presented a comprehensive study on the scalability and efficiency of embedding scaling in LLMs. Through systematic analysis of architectural constraints and comparative scaling laws, we demonstrated that scaling embeddings yields a superior Pareto frontier compared to increasing expert numbers in specific regimes, while our proposed system optimizations, including the N-gram Cache and synchronized kernels, effectively resolve associated I/O bottlenecks. Validating these findings, we introduced LongCat-Flash-Lite, a 68.5B MoE model with over 30B N-gram Embeddingparameters, which not only outperforms parameter-equivalent MoE baselines but also exhibits competitive performance in agentic and coding tasks, thereby establishing a robust and efficient framework for future model scaling.
items.zh: 在本技术报告中，我们对 LLM 中嵌入缩放的扩展性和效率进行了全面研究。通过系统分析架构约束和比较缩放定律，我们证明了在特定范围内，缩放嵌入比增加专家数量能产生更优的帕累托前沿，而我们提出的系统优化（包括 N-gram 缓存和同步内核）有效解决了相关的 I/O 瓶颈。为了验证这些发现，我们介绍了 LongCat-Flash-Lite，一个 68.5B MoE 模型，拥有超过 30B N-gram 嵌入参数，它不仅优于参数等效的 MoE 基线，而且在智能体和编码任务中表现出竞争力，从而为未来的模型缩放建立了一个稳健高效的框架。

items.en: We extend our sincere gratitude to both the infrastructure team and evaluation team for their invaluable support and constructive feedback throughout this project. The primary contributors from these teams include:
items.zh: 我们衷心感谢基础设施团队和评估团队在整个项目中提供的宝贵支持和建设性反馈。这些团队的主要贡献者包括：
